nodes.name: Webhook: Agent Handoff
nodes.notes: Receives handoff requests from other agents via handoff_to_agent tool. Path: /webhook/myloware/ingest

nodes.name: Trigger: Telegram Message
nodes.notes: Triggers workflow when user sends a message via Telegram. Extracts user ID and message text.

nodes.name: Trigger: Chat Interface
nodes.notes: Triggers workflow when user sends a message via the chat UI. Extracts sessionId and chatInput.

nodes.name: AI Agent: Persona Execution
nodes.notes: Universal AI agent that executes any persona (Casey, Iggy, Riley, Veo, Alex, Quinn) based on trace.currentOwner. System prompt and allowed tools are dynamically set from trace_prep output. Uses MCP tools and toolWorkflow nodes to complete tasks.

nodes.name: Language Model: GPT-5 Nano
nodes.notes: OpenAI language model (gpt-5-nano) used by the AI agent for reasoning and tool calling.

nodes.name: Tool: MCP Server Tools
nodes.notes: MCP client that exposes MCP tools (memory_search, memory_store, trace_update, handoff_to_agent, etc.) to the AI agent. Tools are dynamically filtered by trace_prep.allowedTools based on persona capabilities.

parameters.description: Upload files to Google Drive. Use this when you need to store or backup files, assets, or final video outputs. Typically called by Quinn when publishing assets.

nodes.name: Tool: Upload to Google Drive
nodes.notes: Tool workflow for uploading files to Google Drive. Called by AI agent when needed (e.g., Quinn publishing assets).

parameters.description: Upload videos to TikTok. Use this to publish final edited video compilations to TikTok. Called by Quinn persona when publishing final edits. Requires runId parameter.

nodes.name: Tool: Upload to TikTok
nodes.notes: Tool workflow for uploading videos to TikTok. Called by Quinn persona when publishing final edits.

parameters.description: Edit and stitch video compilations using Shotstack API. Use this to combine multiple video clips into a single final edit with transitions, effects, and audio mixing. Called by Alex persona to create final compilations. Requires traceId and videoUrls parameters.

nodes.name: Tool: Shotstack Video Editing
nodes.notes: Tool workflow for video editing via Shotstack API. Called by Alex persona to stitch and edit video compilations. Requires traceId and videoUrls (array of video URL strings).

parameters.description: Generate individual video clips from screenplays. Use this to create video assets based on script content. Called by Veo persona to generate video clips for each screenplay. Requires traceId and screenplay parameters.

nodes.name: Tool: Generate Video
nodes.notes: Tool workflow for video generation. Called by Veo persona to generate individual video clips from screenplays. Requires traceId and screenplay (JSON object with script content).

nodes.name: Normalize Input
nodes.notes: Normalizes input from different sources (webhook, Telegram, chat) into consistent fields: traceId, sessionId, message, source

nodes.name: Normalize SessionId
nodes.notes: Ensures sessionId has proper channel prefix (telegram:, chat:, webhook:) based on source

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.notes: Validates sessionId format, traceId format (UUID or null), source value, and message presence

nodes.name: Prepare Trace Context
nodes.notes: Calls MCP trace_prep endpoint to: create/fetch trace, load persona config, fetch project context, retrieve relevant memories, build system prompt, derive allowed tools. Returns traceId, systemPrompt, allowedTools for the AI agent. Configured with 3 retries and 30s timeout.

nodes.name: Guardrails
nodes.notes: Validates instructions for prompt injection, PII, and jailbreak attempts. Sanitizes input before passing to AI agent.

nodes.name: Log Guardrail Violations
nodes.notes: Logs guardrail violations to memory for security monitoring. Violations are stored with traceId for correlation.

nodes.name: Store Violation Memory
nodes.notes: Stores guardrail violations in memory. Continues on fail to avoid blocking workflow execution.

nodes.name: Guard: Telegram Send
nodes.notes: Validates sessionId starts with telegram: before allowing Telegram send tool

nodes.name: Guard: Telegram HITL
nodes.notes: Validates sessionId starts with telegram: before allowing Telegram HITL tool

nodes.name: Tool: Send Telegram Message
nodes.notes: Tool for sending one-way Telegram messages. Used by agents to send status updates or notifications to users.

nodes.name: Tool: Telegram HITL (Human-in-the-Loop)
nodes.notes: Tool for sending Telegram messages and waiting for user response. Used for HITL approval flows (e.g., Iggy requesting approval for modifiers, Alex requesting approval for final edit). Configured with 1-hour timeout.
